prayer.parsha_theme: blessing children, final words, lasting impact
prayer.modeh_ani: מודה אני לפניך — I gratefully thank You, living and eternal King, for returning my soul within me with compassion.
prayer.blessing: Blessed are You who raises the lowly — lift me to accomplish Your purposes.
prayer.psalm: Psalm 20:4: "May He give you the desire of your heart and make all your plans succeed."
prayer.proverb: Proverbs 16:9: "The heart of man plans his way, but the Lord establishes his steps."
prayer.intention: Protect my family while I work. Guard their hearts and minds.
prayer.closing: May your work today be a pleasing offering. May your rest tonight be deep and restorative.

middle_east.headline: Iran-Israel Conflict Escalates
middle_east.summary: IDF launches extensive airstrikes in Iran. Mojtaba Khamenei named as successor to supreme leader. Fighting escalates across Middle East including Hezbollah involvement.
middle_east.conservative_perspective: Regional instability requires strong US support for Israel and containment of Iranian expansion.
